events.title: STADTMAUERFEST FREINSHEIM
events.summary: “With good mood around the wall” – that’s the motto of the City Wall Festival, which is always celebrated on the third weekend of July. The festi- val, known far beyond the town’s borders, presents itself in a fresh, summery way. Celebrations take place on both sides of the almost entirely pre- served medieval city...

events.title: WEINKERWE EINSELTHUM
events.summary: Every year, numerous wine dignitaries, such as the Zellertaler Wine Princess or the Palatinate Wine Queen, travel to the wine fair in Einselthum. events.title: “SUMMER IN THE CITY”
events.summary: Throughout the summer months the “Stadthalle” hosts an event series titled “Summer in the City” with a live music program of diﬀerent bands. The show takes place on Saturday evenings. events.title: THE FASCINATION OF SPACE
events.summary: On July 18, the museum welcomes NASA astro- naut Kathryn Thornton. She will talk about her four missions with the space shuttles discovery, Endeavour and Columbia at the Forum cinema. events.title: SUMMER SWING AT VOLKSPARK
events.summary: On eight Wednesday evenings in July and August, the Summer Swing will take place again, this year at Volkspark Kaiserslautern. You can look forward to a diverse program. events.title: GREEK SUMMER NIGHT IN RAMSTEIN
events.summary: Each theme night has the focus on a certain country with traditional music, food and drinks. A “Greek Night” will take place on Friday, July 31. Live music by the band “Mikri Kompania” will entertain the audience. The program will include the performance of a Greek dancing group. “ALLES MUSS RAUS!” - THEATER-/MUSIKFEST
